app.name: ɳChat — Self-Hosted Messenger
app.subtitle: Your data. Your server. Your chat.

description.en-US:
ɳChat is a fully open-source, self-hosted messaging app you deploy on your own server in minutes.

Connect to your own ɳChat server — no data goes to third-party clouds, no ads, no account required from us.

FEATURES:
• Channels, DMs, and group conversations
• Threads, replies, reactions, @mentions
• Voice and video calls (with nself Pro plugin)
• End-to-end encryption (E2EE)
• File sharing and image previews
• Message search and pinned messages
• Typing indicators, read receipts, and online presence
• Rich text with markdown and code blocks
• Bot framework with slash commands
• Role-based permissions (owner, admin, moderator, member, guest)
• White-label — your branding, your domain

SELF-HOSTED:
ɳChat requires a backend server you control. Install nself on any Linux VPS, run `nself start`, and connect the app to your own API endpoint.

Don't have a server? The nself team runs community.nself.org — create a free account and try it out.

OPEN SOURCE:
All client app code is MIT licensed. Deploy it, modify it, make it yours. github.com/nself-org/nchat

whatsnew.en-US:
• Rich text editor with @mentions, #channels, and emoji shortcuts
• Improved CallKit integration for voice and video calls
• Faster message loading and smoother animations
• Bug fixes and stability improvements

review.notes:
This app requires a backend server URL. For review, use: https://community.nself.org

Enter this URL on the server setup screen that appears on first launch.

Test accounts:
- owner@nself.org / ReviewerAccount2026! (owner permissions)
- member@nself.org / ReviewerAccount2026! (member permissions)

All features are accessible with the owner account including voice/video calls (tap the phone icon in any channel).
